description: Audit the current `plan --goal` CLI argument definition in cli/src/cli.rs to understand what changes are needed to accept a file path in addition to a raw goal string
Add a `--goal-file` flag (or make `--goal` accept a path) to the Plan subcommand in cli/src/cli.rs, with appropriate help text describing supported file types (`.md`, `.txt`)

Implement a `resolve_goal` helper function in cli/src/main.rs (or a new cli/src/goal.rs module) that: detects whether the goal value looks like a file path, reads the file from disk, and returns the file contents as the goal string. Return a clear error if the file does not exist or cannot be read.
Wire `resolve_goal` into the Plan command handler in cli/src/main.rs so the resolved goal string (from file or inline) is passed to `task_planner.generate_task_plan()`
Add unit tests for `resolve_goal`: inline string passthrough, valid `.md` file read, valid `.txt` file read, missing file error, and unsupported extension warning/error
Update the CLI help text and README/docs to document the new file import capability, including example usage: `wreck-it plan --goal ./my-plan.md`
Run `cargo build` and `cargo test` to verify no regressions; do a manual smoke test with a sample `.md` and `.txt` file
